title: Product sync — 2026-05-14
text:
# Weekly Product Sync — 2026-05-14
Attendees: PM, Eng Lead, CS Lead

## Discussion
- Zephyr Logistics escalated Integrations problems again; churn risk flagged.
- Repeated ask for 'Scheduled report exports' across accounts.
- Eng notes Integrations generates the most support load this month.

## Action items
- [ ] Evaluate 'Scheduled report exports' for roadmap.
- [ ] Investigate Integrations performance regressions.
- [ ] Follow up with Zephyr Logistics.
